summary: Comprehensive testing of Pakistan Intelligence Monitor - All features working correctly. Backend API tests (28/28 passed) and frontend UI tests verified all required functionality.
passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns 200 with healthy status
Backend /api/infrastructure endpoint returns all 5 airports: ISB, KHI, LHE, PEW, MUX
Each airport has: code, name, departures, arrivals, departures_url, arrivals_url
Airport URLs correctly point to flightstats.com
Backend /api/infrastructure returns all 3 ports: Karachi, Port Qasim, Gwadar
Each port has: in_port, arrivals, departures, expected counts and url
Backend /api/news endpoint returns news articles with proper structure
Backend /api/economic endpoint returns economic indicators (MOCKED)
Backend /api/weather endpoint returns weather for Pakistani cities (MOCKED)
Backend /api/security endpoint returns security alerts (MOCKED)
Backend /api/regional endpoint returns regional relations data (MOCKED)
Backend /api/map-data endpoint returns map markers
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all panels
Frontend: News ticker scrolls BREAKING headlines at top
Frontend: Latest News panel shows 96+ items
Frontend: News category tabs (ALL, GENERAL, REGIONAL, ENERGY, BUSINESS, TECH, INTERNATIONAL) work correctly
Frontend: Infrastructure panel displays all 5 airports with format 'Name (CODE)'
Frontend: Airport departure and arrival counts displayed with icons
Frontend: Port Status section shows all 3 ports with In Port, Arrivals, Departures, Expected counts
Frontend: Port links are clickable (data-testid verified for all 3 ports)
Frontend: Map section shows Pakistan overview with legend
Frontend: Economic Indicators panel shows PKR rates, KSE-100, inflation
Frontend: Weather panel shows 6 cities with temperatures
Frontend: Regional Relations panel shows diplomatic status with 6 countries
seed_data_creation: None needed - backend scrapes real data from flightstats.com and RSS feeds
context_for_next_testing_agent: All infrastructure features (5 airports, 3 ports) are working. Backend scrapes real flight data from flightstats.com and port data from myshiptracking.com. News is aggregated from ~12 Pakistani RSS feeds including energy news. Economic, Security, Weather, and Regional endpoints use MOCKED data.

mocked_apis.note: As mentioned in requirements, some APIs return mock data
real_data_endpoints: /api/news - Real RSS feeds from ~12 Pakistani news sources
/api/infrastructure - Real scraped data from flightstats.com and myshiptracking.com
